docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $608.54 FILED BY MASSETTI, GIANCARLO AS TO DEFENDANT CASCINI, MASSIMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASSETTI, GIANCARLO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED FEB-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASCINI, MASSIMO
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASSETTI, GIANCARLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASCINI, MASSIMO $531.47 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $531.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT CASCINI, MASSIMO
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT (SC-220) FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT CASCINI, MASSIMO
RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS(SC-221) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASSETTI, GIANCARLO

ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (INSTALLMENTS) FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $100.00 ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING DATE: MAY-01-2011 UNTIL SEPT-01-2011 THE FINAL DATE. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $131.47. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SMALL CLAIMS)
